name: Impossible French Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease a pie plate, 10" x 1 1/2".
3. Mix apples and spices; turn into the plate.
4. Beat remaining ingredients except for Streusel until smooth (15 seconds in blender or 1 minute with hand beater).
5. Pour mixture into the plate.
6. Sprinkle with Streusel.
7. Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, 55-65 minutes.
8. Cool.
